periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 73. Southwest wind around 12 mph.

periods.name: Sunday
periods.short_forecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 2pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 92. West wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Sunday Night
periods.short_forecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Cloudy
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before midnight. Partly cloudy, with a low around 70. North wind 1 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.detailed_forecast: Sunny, with a high near 76. Northeast wind 8 to 14 mph.
